[There is another reading in the place of
The method of preparation is the same as before. In the next verse
he mentions a third variety of glue.]
firoyftcqTHt ^ qw \\ VJ \\
There is a third variety of glue known as Vajratala {Adamantine
Surface) which is constituted by the horns of cows, buffaloes and
goats, hair of donkeys, buffalo-hide, cow-hide, Neem fruits, wood
apples and myrrh.
[This mixture too should be boiled and reduced as before. In
this glue some organic substances are also included.]
Next he mentions a fourth variety of glue taught by Maya.
3^ qniT: g i
qtntsq qrff; U «; M
A compound of eight parts of lead, two of bell-metal, and one
of iron rust, has been mentioned by Maya and is to be known as
Vajra-sanghdta (Adamantine compound).
